verses.1: My son, if you will receive my words And treasure my commandments within you,
verses.2: Make your ear attentive to wisdom; Incline your heart to understanding.
verses.3: For if you cry out for insight, And raise your voice for understanding;
verses.4: If you seek her as silver And search for her as for hidden treasures;
verses.5: Then you will understand the fear of the LORD, And discover the knowledge of God.
verses.6: For the LORD gives wisdom; From His mouth come knowledge and understanding.
verses.7: He stores up sound wisdom for the upright; He is a shield to those who walk in integrity,
verses.8: Guarding the paths of justice, And He watches over the way of His godly ones.
verses.9: Then you will discern righteousness, justice, And integrity, and every good path.
verses.10: For wisdom will enter your heart, And knowledge will be delightful to your soul;
verses.11: Discretion will watch over you, Understanding will guard you,
verses.12: To rescue you from the way of evil, From a person who speaks perverse things;
verses.13: From those who leave the paths of uprightness To walk in the ways of darkness;
verses.14: Who delight in doing evil And rejoice in the perversity of evil;
verses.15: Whose paths are crooked, And who are devious in their ways;
verses.16: To rescue you from the strange woman, From the foreign woman who flatters with her words,
verses.17: Who leaves the companion of her youth And forgets the covenant of her God;
verses.18: For her house sinks down to death, And her tracks lead to the dead;
verses.19: None who go to her return, Nor do they reach the paths of life.
verses.20: So you will walk in the way of good people And keep to the paths of the righteous.
verses.21: For the upright will live in the land, And the blameless will remain in it;
verses.22: But the wicked will be eliminated from the land, And the treacherous will be torn away from it.
